allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm\\node.exe", "C:\\nvm4w\\node.exe", "C:\\tools\\nodejs\\node.exe", "C:\\Users\\user\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs\\current\\node.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND: $p" } else { "no:    $p" } }; "---PATH---"; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|nvm|npm' })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; if \($r\) { "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) - Location: $\($r.Headers['Location']\)" }; "---"; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/fr" -TimeoutSec 30; "Status /fr: $\($r2.StatusCode\) - Length: $\($r2.RawContent.Length\) chars" } catch { "Error: $_" })
